content.body:
## Dependencies / Ordering

### Hard Blockers

- None.

### Soft Ordering

- Requires at least one real visual acquisition path from P3-AV2, P3-AV3, P3-AV4, or P3-AV5. This is an OR dependency, so no single GitHub hard blocker should be used unless the coordinator chooses a specific first provider path.
